testCase.name: Home Integration (Data Loading) should show error message when categories fail to load
Home Integration (Data Loading) should correctly filter news and update state
AppService should be created
AppService should have errorAPI and authAPI injected
Admin Integration (User Management) should add a new category and refresh list
Admin Integration (User Management) should block user and update the users signal
Auth Integration (Register) should register user and navigate to home page
SubscriptionsService should load subs on init
SubscriptionsService should call unsubscribeFromAuthor when unsubAuthor is called
SubscriptionsService should unsubscribe from category
SubscriptionsService should unsubscribe from author
SubscriptionsService should load subscriptions on loadSubs call
AdminService should go to page
AdminService should not add category if name is empty
AdminService should cancel editing
AdminService should return user to user role
AdminService should start editing category
AdminService should delete category
AdminService should not delete category if handle error
AdminService should save edited category
AdminService should make author
AdminService should not save category if name is empty
AdminService should initialize with default pagination values
AdminService should toggle block user
AdminService should load users
AdminService should load categories on init
AdminService should load non admin users with current filters
AdminService should update user role to USER and update list
AdminService should add category
AdminService should update user list after blocking
AdminService should filter users
Subscriptions Integration should load subscriptions on init
Subscriptions Integration should handle unsubscribe from author
NewsDetailService should check if user can edit own news
NewsDetailService should load news details on init
NewsDetailService should allow admin to edit any news
NewsDetailService should delete news
NewsDetailService should not allow other users to edit
NewsDetailService should subscribe to author
NewsDetailService should navigate to edit
NewsDetailService should alert after subscribing to category
NewsDetailService should not allow non-logged user to edit
AuthServices LoginService should handle login error
AuthServices LoginService should login and navigate
AuthServices LoginService should set loading to true while logging in
AuthServices RegisterService should initialize with empty regData
AuthServices RegisterService should handle register error
AuthServices RegisterService should set loading to true while registering
AuthServices RegisterService should register and navigate
NewsDetail Integration should load news details on init
MyNewsService should delete news after confirm
MyNewsService should not delete news if not confirmed
MyNewsService should reload news on loadMyNews call
MyNewsService should navigate to edit news
MyNewsService should load my news on init
MyNewsService should set isLoading while loading news
MyNews Integration should load my news and delete one
Auth Integration (Login) should login user and navigate to home page
CreateNews Integration should load categories for form
CreateNews Integration should create news successfully
HomeService should add and remove authors via toggleAuthor
HomeService should load subscriptions if user logged in
HomeService should manage category subscriptions updates
HomeService should load news with search query
HomeService should add and remove categories via toggleCategory
HomeService should load initial data
HomeService should reset filters on toggleShowAll
HomeService should check subscriptions
HomeService should navigate pages via prevPage and nextPage within boundaries
HomeService should toggle showAll and load news
HomeService should manage author subscriptions updates
HomeService should handle onSearch correctly
HomeService should load user subscriptions correctly
HomeService should check if is subscribed to author
HomeService should clear news if no subscriptions found and user logged in
HomeService should load news based on active user subscriptions
HomeService should handle pagination
HomeService should load all news if not logged in
CreateNewsService should load categories
CreateNewsService should call createNews when no editing id
CreateNewsService should update newsInput from navigation extras
CreateNewsService should call updateNews when editing id exists
CreateNewsService should navigate back after edit
Interceptors AuthInterceptor should add Authorization header if token exists
Interceptors AuthInterceptor should NOT add Authorization header if no token
Interceptors ErrorInterceptor should parse JSON error messages
Interceptors ErrorInterceptor should catch string error and call ErrorAPI
Interceptors ErrorInterceptor should handle HTML error responses gracefully
